---
title: "Tallying data"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(here)
library(ggpubr)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(waffle)
library(sf)

rdsi_dir <- "/mnt/rdsi/raw_data"

```

Trends in the use of Premix in LCA

```{r}

full_data <-  
  read_csv("data/Premix papers v 25-01-14.csv") |> 
  clean_names() |> 
  mutate(animal_type = case_when(animal_type == "pig" ~ "Pig",
                                 TRUE ~ animal_type)) |> 
  mutate(animal_type = case_when(is.na(animal_type) & animal == "Rainbow trout" ~ "Fish/Crustaceans",
                                 animal == "Dairy Cattle" ~ "Cattle",
                                 is.na(animal_type) ~ animal,
                                 TRUE ~ animal_type)) |> 
  mutate(mineral_premix_included_y_n = case_when(mineral_premix_included_y_n == "?" ~ "N",
                                                 is.na(mineral_premix_included_y_n) ~ "N",
                                                 TRUE ~ mineral_premix_included_y_n)) |> 
  mutate(inclusion = case_when(mineral_premix_included_y_n == "Y" & proxy_y_n == "N" ~ "Included",
                               mineral_premix_included_y_n == "Y" & proxy_y_n == "Y" ~  "Included as proxy",
                               TRUE ~ "Omitted"))

#Check unique animal types
(animal_types <- full_data |> pull(animal_type) |> unique())


#check for NAs
full_data |> 
  filter(is.na(animal_type))


summary_by_spp <- 
  full_data |> 
  group_by(animal_type, mineral_premix_included_y_n) |> 
  count() |> 
  rename(Premix = mineral_premix_included_y_n) |> 
  mutate(Premix = case_when(Premix == "Y" ~ "Premix included",
                            TRUE ~ "Premix not included")) |> 
  mutate(animal_type = case_when(animal_type == "Fish/Crustaceans" ~ "Fish/\nCrustaceans", 
                                 TRUE ~ animal_type)) |> 
  mutate(animal_type = factor(animal_type, levels = c("Cattle", "Chicken", "Pig", "Fish/\nCrustaceans")))
  
  

(p1 <- 
  ggplot(data = summary_by_spp)+
  aes(x = reorder(animal_type, -n), y = n, fill = Premix )+
  geom_col()+
  theme_pubr()+
  labs(y = "Number of studies")+
  scale_fill_manual(values = brewer.pal(n = 2, "Dark2"))+
    theme(legend.position = c(0.75, 0.9),
          legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
          legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
          legend.title = element_blank(),
          text = element_text(size=10),
                  axis.text = element_text(size=9),
          axis.title.x = element_blank())
  )

ggsave(filename = "explore/cottrell_explore/overall_count.jpg", device = "jpg", dpi = 300, width=8.9, height =8, units = "cm")


summary_by_inclusion <- 
  full_data |> 
  group_by(animal_type, inclusion) |> 
  count() |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  group_by(animal_type) |> 
  nest() |> 
  mutate(total = map(data, ~(sum(.$n)))) |> 
  unnest(c(data, total)) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(prop = n/total) |> 
  mutate(animal_type = factor(animal_type, levels = c("Cattle", "Chicken", "Pig", "Fish/Crustaceans"))) |>
  mutate(inclusion = case_when(inclusion == "Included as proxy" ~ "Included\nas proxy", 
                               TRUE ~ inclusion))
  



(p2 <- 
  ggplot(data = summary_by_inclusion)+
  aes(x = inclusion,  y = prop, fill = animal_type )+
  geom_col(position = "dodge")+
  theme_pubr()+
  theme(legend.position = c(0.3, 0.85),
          legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
          legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
          text = element_text(size=10),
        axis.text = element_text(size=9),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        legend.title = element_blank())+
  scale_fill_manual(values = brewer.pal(4, "PRGn"))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1))+
  labs(y = "Proportion of studies")
)

ggsave(filename = "explore/cottrell_explore/count_by_inclusion_level.jpg", device = "jpg", dpi = 300, width=8.9, height =8, units = "cm")

ggarrange(p1, p2, 
          nrow = 1, 
          ncol = 2, 
          widths = c(1,1),
          labels = "auto", 
          font.label = list(size = 10))

ggsave(filename = "figures/summary_of_inclusion_and_inclusion_type.jpg", device = "jpg", dpi=600, width = 18, height = 8, units="cm")



```

Explore the nature of the proxy used

```{r}

proxy_types <- 
  full_data |> 
  filter(proxy_y_n == "Y") |> 
   mutate(proxy_name = fct_collapse(proxy_name,
                                   'Sodium chloride'='Salt (sodium chloride)',
                                   'Calcium carbonate'=c ('Limestone','Limestone (calcium carbonate)', 'Limestone is assumed to be a proxy for mineral premix listed in feed composition data'))) |> 
  mutate(proxy_name = str_to_sentence(proxy_name)) |> 
  mutate(proxy_name = case_when(proxy_name == "Sodium bicarbonate, europe, at mill'" ~ "Sodium bicarbonate",
                                proxy_name == "Calcium carbonate, sodium bicarbonate and calcium phosphate" ~ "Mixed",
                                TRUE ~ proxy_name)) |> 
  group_by(proxy_name) |> 
  count() 

 
  # mutate(proxy_name = factor(proxy_name, levels = c("Calcium carbonate", 
  #                                                   "Phosphorus", 
  #                                                   "Sodium chloride", 
  #                                                   "Sodium bicarbonate", 
  #                                                   "Phosphate",
  #                                                   "Phosphorus",
  #                                                   "Sodium bicarbonate",
  #                                                   
  #                                                   )))
  



proxy_types$proxy_name |> unique()


ggplot(data = proxy_types)+
  aes(fill = proxy_name, values = n)+
  geom_waffle(n_rows = 5)+
  theme_void()+
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )


p1 <- ggplot(proxy_types |> 
         mutate(proxy_name = case_when(proxy_name == "Calcium carbonate" ~ "Calcium\ncarbonate",
                                       proxy_name == "Sodium chloride" ~ "Sodium\nchloride",
                                       proxy_name == "Sodium bicarbonate" ~ "Sodium\nbicarbonate",
                                       proxy_name == "Crystalline amino acids" ~ "Crystalline\namino acids",
                                       TRUE ~ proxy_name)) |> 
  mutate(proxy_name = factor(proxy_name, levels = c("Calcium\ncarbonate", "Sodium\nchloride", "Phosphorus", "Sodium\nbicarbonate", "Phosphate", "Maize starch", "Crystalline\namino acids", "Mixed"))))+
  aes(y = n, x = reorder(proxy_name, desc(proxy_name)), fill = proxy_name)+
  geom_col()+
  theme_pubr()+
  theme(
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    text = element_text(size=10),
    axis.text = element_text(size=9),
    #axis.text.y = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
  
    )+
  labs(y = "Number of studies")+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Calcium\ncarbonate" = brewer.pal(8, name = "BuPu")[8],
                               "Phosphorus" = brewer.pal(8, name = "BuPu")[6],
                               "Sodium\nchloride" = brewer.pal(8, name = "BuPu")[7],
                               "Sodium\nbicarbonate" = brewer.pal(8, name = "BuPu")[5],
                               "Phosphate" = brewer.pal(8, name = "BuPu")[4],
                               "Mixed" = brewer.pal(8, name = "BuPu")[2],
                               "Maize starch" = brewer.pal(8, name = "BuPu")[3],
                               "Crystalline\namino acids" = brewer.pal(8, name = "BuPu")[2]))+
  guides(fill=FALSE)+
  coord_flip()

ggsave(filename = "figures/proxy_type.jpg", device = "jpg", dpi = 600, width = 8.9, height = 8, units = "cm")



proxy_types_taxa <- 
  full_data |> 
  filter(proxy_y_n == "Y") |> 
   mutate(proxy_name = fct_collapse(proxy_name,
                                   'Sodium chloride'='Salt (sodium chloride)',
                                   'Calcium carbonate'=c ('Limestone','Limestone (calcium carbonate)', 'Limestone is assumed to be a proxy for mineral premix listed in feed composition data'))) |> 
  mutate(proxy_name = str_to_sentence(proxy_name)) |> 
  mutate(proxy_name = case_when(proxy_name == "Sodium bicarbonate, europe, at mill'" ~ "Sodium bicarbonate",
                                proxy_name == "Calcium carbonate, sodium bicarbonate and calcium phosphate" ~ "Mixed",
                                TRUE ~ proxy_name)) |> 
  mutate(proxy_name = case_when(proxy_name == "Calcium carbonate" ~ "Calcium\ncarbonate",
                                       proxy_name == "Sodium chloride" ~ "Sodium\nchloride",
                                       proxy_name == "Sodium bicarbonate" ~ "Sodium\nbicarbonate",
                                       proxy_name == "Crystalline amino acids" ~ "Crystalline\namino acids",
                                       TRUE ~ proxy_name)) |> 
         mutate(proxy_name = factor(proxy_name, levels = c("Calcium\ncarbonate", "Sodium\nchloride", "Phosphorus", "Sodium\nbicarbonate", "Phosphate", "Maize starch", "Crystalline\namino acids", "Mixed"))) |> 
  mutate(animal_type = factor(animal_type, levels = c("Cattle", "Chicken", "Pig", "Fish/Crustaceans"))) |> 
  select(proxy_name,animal_type) |> 
  table() |> as.data.frame()


p2 <- ggplot(data = proxy_types_taxa |> 
               mutate(proxy_name = factor(proxy_name, levels = c("Calcium\ncarbonate", "Sodium\nchloride", "Phosphorus", "Sodium\nbicarbonate", "Phosphate", "Maize starch", "Crystalline\namino acids", "Mixed"))))+
  aes(x = reorder(proxy_name, desc(proxy_name)), y = Freq, fill = animal_type)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge")+
  scale_fill_manual(values = brewer.pal(4, "PRGn"))+
  theme_pubr()+
  theme(
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.position = c(0.75, 0.14),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    text = element_text(size=10),
    axis.text = element_text(size=9),
    #axis.text.y = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
  
    )+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0))+
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(1.5, 2.5, 3.5, 4.5, 5.5, 6.5, 7.5), linetype = 2, colour = "grey90")+
  labs(y = "No. of studies")+
  coord_flip()

ggsave(filename = "figures/proxy_type_by_taxa.jpg", device = "jpg", dpi = 600, width = 8.9, height = 8, units = "cm")




ggarrange(p1, p2, 
          nrow = 1, 
          ncol = 2, 
          widths = c(1,1),
          labels = "auto", 
          font.label = list(size = 10))

ggsave(filename = "figures/summary_of_proxies_used.jpg", device = "jpg", dpi=600, width = 18, height = 8, units="cm")

```

Overlay of mining for key metals in premix with biodiversity layers

```{r}

mining_facilities <- st_read(file.path(rdsi_dir, "mining_locations/jasansky_2023_global_mining_disaggregated/data/facilities.gpkg"))


mining_facilities |> pull(primary_commodity) |> unique()


plot(mining_facilities |> select(primary_commodity) |> filter(primary_commodity %in% c("Copper", "Iron", "Zinc", "Other mine")))


mining_facilities |> pull(primary_commodity) |> unique()


```
